title: cerastium decalvans var. orbelicum
intro: Cerastium decalvans var. orbelicum, also known as mountain chickweed or Orbelic chickweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family and is native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Cerastium decalvans var. orbelicum include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption and use.
